hub.metaTitle: Solutions by project type — Budget Free Engine
hub.metaDescription: 11 software types covered with a free estimate in minutes: websites, e-commerce, apps, SaaS, automation, AI and more.
hub.title: Solutions by project type
hub.subtitle: Pick the format closest to your project and get a precise estimate in minutes.

common.heroSubtitle: {pitch}. Get complexity, investment range and timeline — no signup required.
common.painItem1: Asked for quotes and got three wildly different prices?
common.painItem2: Started a project and watched the scope explode halfway through?
common.painItem3: Hired without technical criteria and regretted it?
common.benefit1Desc: Smart questions that reveal your project's real complexity.
common.benefit2Desc: Instant answer — no waiting days for commercial proposals.
common.benefit3Desc: Estimate in BRL, USD or EUR, in 4 languages — compare global vendors.
common.scopeItem1: Core features for this project type
common.stack1Desc: TypeScript + leading JS framework for speed and maintainability.
common.stack2Desc: REST/GraphQL API with relational DB and cache.
common.stack3Desc: Serverless hosting with global CDN and monitoring.
common.stack4Desc: Logs, metrics and tracing for production debugging.
common.step2Desc: Complexity, value and timeline on screen.
common.faq1Q: How much does this type of project cost?
common.faq1A: It depends on features, integrations and team. Use the free quote to see a real range based on your scope.
common.faq2A: No. The flow translates questions into business language.
common.faq3Q: Does the estimate work with any vendor?
common.faq3A: Yes. It's based on 42 universal market criteria.
common.faq4A: The estimate includes a timeline range based on complexity.
common.ctaFinalDesc: In 5 minutes you get a real estimate.

landing.title: Calculate your software project budget
landing.subtitle: 42 smart questions that adapt to your project. Get a complexity estimate, investment range, and timeline.
landing.featureTreeDesc: 42 adaptive questions that automatically adjust to your project type, revealing the real complexity.
landing.featureInstantDesc: Detailed result with investment range, timeline, and complexity level generated in seconds.
landing.featureMultilingualDesc: Full support for PT, EN, ES, and IT with values in BRL, USD, and EUR.
landing.testimonial1Quote: I saved hours of spreadsheets and alignment meetings. Now I arrive at conversations with the numbers already structured.
landing.testimonial2Quote: I use it to give quick estimates to clients before closing a proposal. Professional and objective.
landing.testimonial3Quote: The 42 questions cover everything I need to qualify a project. An indispensable tool.

resume.subject: Your estimate is in progress — come back and finish
resume.preview: Pick up where you left off and get your estimate in minutes.
resume.body: You started calculating an estimate with Budget Free Engine and paused halfway. Your answers are saved and you can pick up right where you left off.
resume.expiryNotice: Your answers are kept for a limited time. Come back now to avoid losing your progress.
resume.privacyNotice: You received this email because you started an estimate and shared your address during the flow (legitimate interest — GDPR/LGPD).
resume.rightsInfo: To exercise your rights or stop receiving these reminders, reply to this email.

expired.title: Your session has expired
expired.description: After more than 7 days of inactivity your progress can no longer be resumed. Start a new estimate — it only takes a few minutes.

unsubscribe.title: Unsubscribe
unsubscribe.successMessage: You will no longer receive automatic emails. Thanks for your interest.
